content.full_text:
GOLD, MARKS, RING & PEPPER
1800 AVENUE OF THE STARS
SUITE 300
LOS ANGELES, CALIFORNIA 90067

TELEPHONE (213) 277-1000

FACSIMILE (213) 553-4647


March 13, 1990


Mr. John Larson
Chairman
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street
Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Request for Conflict of Interest Opinion

Dear Mr. Larson:

I represent G.H. Palmer Associates, a real estate development
company which has applied for various municipal approvals from the
City of Santa Clarita.

A Councilmember, together with her husband, own a piece of
property which will be economically impacted by the approval or
denial of my client's projects. If the projects are approved, her
property may be reduced in value. If the projects are denied, her
property may be increased in value.

While there may have been informal conversations with staff
regarding this issue, no formal opinion letter has been issued. We
would appreciate a formal opinion letter as to whether, given the
facts described, the Councilmember may participate in the vote.

If additional facts or information are necessary, please do
not hesitate to let me know.

Thanking you in advance for your cooperation.

Very truly yours,

Douglas R. Ring
of GOLD, MARKS, RING & PEPPER

DRR:sr

GOOD Kinds Of Fruits Of Prosperous

[illegible] in [illegible] 250

[illegible]

[illegible] [illegible]

[illegible] [illegible]

[illegible] [illegible]
